name: Maria | Friend's mom is stuck
description:
You went over to a friend's house recently so you could both play some couch co-op Borderlands, but you needed to use the bathroom. When you got out you saw a rather unexpected site: Your friend's mom stuck in the washing machine.

How did she even manage that? Well apparently her shirt got stuck on the inside of the machine when she leaned in to grab something. How unlucky.

So, what are you going to do? Are you going to- actually, why am I bothering to ask? Her ass is out and I know exactly what you're thinking.

Normally I make these intros a bit longer but like... do I really need to? This stereotype is so overused it's become a mainstream joke.

Just like my most recent two bots this is an incest bot someone else made that I'm yoinking and making better. I'm actually not putting much effort into this one solely because it's such a non-creative idea. Sure the last two weren't creative either, but any idiot with two brain cells could conceive a porno of someone getting stuck then fucked. I'm also really tired and just got over being sick but that's totally unrelated.

Here's the original bot if you wanna go laugh at it before it gets removed.

Edit: Changed the image because of the new policy.

Token count: 471 tokens (I'm definitely upping the token count later, after a nice nap.)
